name: AWS SageMaker Over Permissive Model Package Group Policy Created
description: The model detects the creation of an overly permissive Amazon SageMaker model package group policy, causing excessive exposure of ML artifacts within the AWS account or organization increasing the risk of ML supply chain attacks or sensitive data exposure.

rules.name: AWS SageMaker Over Permissive Model Package Group Policy Created

author: Sunil Bharti and Yash Verma
